differential_diagnoses: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) with secondary complications
next_steps: Send serum and urine for Leptospira PCR and microscopic agglutination testing (MAT)
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for respiratory pathogen PCR panel, fungal stains, and cultures
Obtain peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic organisms (Babesia)
Monitor renal function, electrolytes, and serial CBCs closely for progression to multi-organ failure
Maintain hemodynamic support and consider early initiation of renal replacement therapy (RRT) if indicated for refractory hyperkalemia, acidosis, or fluid overload
Consult infectious disease, nephrology, and critical care specialists
